commands.summary: Regenerated audits/reports/dashboard.md so Repopact reflects CLV-019 as satisfied with decision 0010 and evidence metadata.
Repopact doctor reported the repository healthy after CLV-019 records were added.
Repository governance validation passed with CLV-019 marked satisfied and the new decision/evidence records current.
Local system audit passed with CLV-019 evidence, decision index, and work item metadata current.
Production dependency audit completed with 0 high-or-higher vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-019 (direct telecom research). Decision 0010 records what it would take to reduce reliance on Twilio/Telnyx/Plivo/Bandwidth for carrier SMS/MMS and PSTN voice, covering SIP trunking, SMPP, SMSC/MMSC access, phone number provisioning, A2P/10DLC, STIR/SHAKEN, caller ID reputation, CNAM, E911/emergency scope, toll-free/short-code options, carrier partnership, operating costs, why direct telecom is not the first implementation path, and the lowest-friction staged path if ForgeLink later needs a more direct telecom edge.
